payload.answer: In Admin SQL select-only mode, reads from memory_cards are permitted (e.g., SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10). Deletions are denied. No memory_delete operations are allowed under current policy.

entity_resolution.reason: system mode explicitly forbids deletions; selects allowed

memory_cards.statement: Admin SQL select-only mode: SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 allowed; DELETE FROM memory_cards denied.

details: DELETE statements are blocked by policy.
